data.content:
Plan v3 addresses all previous review rejections: targets the correct
production rendering path (compatibility.rs → render_prompt_body in
mod.rs), leaves poll_claim.rs/action_prompt.rs untouched, does not
modify prompt templates, and defers canonical target work to child
knots-95c0 (blocked on c8f4). Changes: refactor build_prompt_params()
and render_prompt_body() signatures to accept Option<&ActionOutputDef>
directly; update compatibility.rs caller to resolve via
step_metadata_for(); update test helpers; add 2 new unit tests.
~25 lines across 3 source files + ~20 lines tests. Low risk.
